Use the `project-digest-triage` skill.

Read the generated files under `automation_outputs/project_digest/`.
Produce an operational digest review for maintainers.

Requirements:
- Summarize the top blockers first.
- Then list due-soon work and scenario watch items.
- Then give owner next actions.
- Then state the latest validation signal.
- End with the top three highest-leverage moves for the next work session.
- If files are missing, say exactly which ones are missing.

Keep the response concise, structured, and action-oriented.
